input_text: A garden wall was high. The street is in Tallinn. Estonia is not outside Europe. The guide offered the tourists tea. The stone was heavy. Mice are afraid of cats. The rain continued. Mark is not in the box. The bike is small. Agatha is in trouble. Is it false that John is nice?
